{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Overlords (Cradle)
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The strongest participants in the battle are Overlords.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Overlords will accompany [[Calan]]'s group to deal with interference.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
